label: Funding shortfall and project delay should flip base to bear
title: Funding Update
summary: The company disclosed a funding shortfall and project delay.
extracted_facts: Funding shortfall emerged before planned milestones.
Project delay was confirmed for the next quarter.

label: Ahead-of-plan permitting should move base to bull
title: Permitting Update
summary: Permit approval arrived ahead of schedule and management said the project remains funded.
extracted_facts: Permit approval ahead of schedule was granted.
Funding remains sufficient for planned milestones.

label: Routine Appendix 3B should not move the scenario
title: Appendix 3B Application for Quotation of Securities
summary: Routine application for quotation of securities.
extracted_facts: Application for quotation of existing securities.

label: Operational confirmation should keep the base path while surfacing a review signal
title: Operational Update
summary: Processing arrangements remain active and the project remains on track.
extracted_facts: Funding remains sufficient for planned milestones.
Processing plant operations remain on track.

label: Permit withdrawal should force a bear-path rerun
title: Permitting Setback
summary: Key permit was withdrawn and the development timeline is now at risk.
extracted_facts: Permit approval was withdrawn by the regulator.
The project timeline is at risk following the permit setback.

label: New facility and milestone achievement should improve the path
title: Funding Secured
summary: A new facility was secured and a major project milestone was achieved.
extracted_facts: Funding remains sufficient for planned milestones.
A new debt facility was secured for project funding.
The milestone was achieved ahead of schedule.
